name: Republic of Karelia (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the upper stripe; recalls the flag of the Karelo-Finnish SSR
the lakes and rivers of Karelia
the forests and nature of Karelia

description: A horizontal tricolour of red, blue, and green in equal stripes.
history: Adopted by the Supreme Council of the Republic of Karelia on 16 February 1993. Designed by Alexander Ivanovich Kinnear; the design is based on the flag of the Karelo-Finnish SSR. Approved by 75 of 113 deputies in April 1993.
